title: 3D FOOD
description: Turns all products in the game into realistic 3D models
body: Texture pack for Minecraft - "3D Food"! This package turns all the food in the game into realistic 3D models, adding extra elements and dimension to each bite. Now bread, apples, and even pumpkin pies look like they could be picked up and eaten right from the screen. Enjoy new visual experiences and make your cooking game even more interactive with "3D Food"!
